commit_message:
First version of the example TB using PyUVM for the Student Subsystems First version of the example TB using PyUVM for the Student Subsystems A working PyUVM test bench example for student_ss_1.sv.

We had to fix an RTL bug in the student subsystem to get it to compile with Icarus 11.0.

Navigate to verification/stsudent_ss/readme.md to get started,.
